title: Memora Events Logo Design
description: A luxurious, minimalist 'M' logomark crafted for Memora Events. The interlocking golden ribbon design creates an infinity motif, complemented by a subtle star accent. Set against a deep, premium navy background, the identity exudes sophistication, perfect for high-end event management.

title: EZVIZ Smart Camera Promotional Poster
description: A high-energy, conversion-focused promotional poster developed for SR CCTV Solution. The design utilizes a vibrant yellow layout with bold, readable typography and structured hierarchy to highlight key product features and a promotional price tag, driving immediate customer engagement.

title: Gayathri Makeover Artistry Brand Identity
description: An elegant and refined brand identity designed for Gayathri Makeover Artistry. The logo features a classic gold 'G' monogram accompanied by delicate, flowing flourishes, set against a rich amethyst purple background, communicating luxury, beauty, and professional cosmetic artistry.

title: Little Genius Educational Campaign
description: A bright and engaging social media poster designed for the 'Little Genius' educational program. Utilizing playful typography, organic shapes, and a highly contrasted visual language, the campaign captures the attention of parents while communicating the benefits of interactive learning for children.

title: Gayathri Makeover Artistry Brand Identity (Alternate)
description: An elegant and refined brand identity designed for Gayathri Makeover Artistry. The logo features a classic gold 'G' monogram accompanied by delicate, flowing flourishes, set against a rich amethyst purple background, communicating luxury, beauty, and professional cosmetic artistry.

title: Treat Ooo! Showel Biryani Promo
description: A visually striking promotional graphic for Treat Ooo! Lake Resort's new 'Showel Biryani'. The design creates a premium dining narrative using dramatic, dark-themed photography, elegant typography, and a creative composite that showcases the dish served directly on a shovel, appealing to food enthusiasts.

title: BS Gift Gallery Graduation Campaign
description: A sophisticated promotional flyer for BS Gift Gallery's Graduation Collection. The layout utilizes an elegant purple and gold color scheme with dynamic, overlapping diamond-shaped image containers, effectively showcasing graduation gifts and creating a cohesive, premium brand presentation.

title: Treat Ooo! 13th Anniversary Celebration
description: An upscale promotional graphic celebrating the 13th Anniversary of Treat Ooo! Lake Resort. The design features a celebratory black and gold motif, confetti elements, and high-quality food photography layout that highlights an exclusive 'Buy 2 Get 1 Free' offer.

title: Summit Event Management Corporate Identity
description: A clean, modern corporate identity and services card designed for Summit Event Management. The minimalist geometric mountain logo pairs with elegant typography and a soft, romantic beach wedding background, establishing trust and professionalism in the event planning sector.

title: World Oceans Day Creative Composite
description: A compelling digital composite created for World Oceans Day. The artwork features a vintage maritime aesthetic, blending a deep-sea diver with vibrant coral reefs, framed by a distressed paper texture that mimics the ocean surface, raising awareness through compelling conceptual art.

title: Online Dating App Interface Presentation
description: A comprehensive UI/UX design presentation for a modern dating application. Showcased in a dynamic, 3D-layered mockup format with neon accents and floating elements, the design highlights intuitive chat interfaces, engaging profile cards, and a seamless user experience tailored for digital interaction.
